# Runtime Isolation Certification Plan

This planning note tracks Phase 7.1 deterministic runtime isolation certification planning. It is non-executing and does not create workflows, jobs, deployment automation, provider implementation, runtime execution, sandbox execution, or autonomous communication.

## Scope

- Add deterministic runtime isolation certification documentation.
- Define conceptual containment zones.
- Define blast-radius containment planning.
- Define rollback survivability planning.
- Define blockers, escalation, and governance requirements.
- Preserve legacy runtime segregation and non-certified status.

## Out Of Scope

- Runtime communication
- Sandbox execution
- Provider activation
- Provider adapters
- Executable workflows
- Deployment automation
- Database writes
- Background jobs or timers
- Autonomous communication

## Completion Signal

Phase 7.1 is complete only when the documentation remains planning-only, runtime-disabled truth is preserved, sandbox execution remains disabled, no provider implementation exists, and the next step remains Phase 7.2 execution-boundary survivability planning.
